articles.description: TL;DR: A 5-year AdGuard VPN plan for $39.97 that covers up to 10 devices with strong privacy features and global access. If you’ve ever thought about getting a VPN but didn’t want another monthly subscription, this is the kind of offer that might make you reconsider. The AdGuard VPN 5-year subscription is $39.97 (MSRP $359.40). At its core, this is about keeping your browsing private and your data secure. AdGuard uses its own protocol to balance speed and security, so you’re not stuck choosing between a slow connection and staying protected. It also has a strict no-logs policy, which means your activity isn’t being tracked or stored. You can connect up to 10 devices at once , which is great if you’re juggling a laptop, phone, tablet, or just want to cover your whole household. There are 70+ server locations, too, so accessing region-specific content or just browsing more freely is pretty straightforward. For most people who want reliable privacy, decent speeds, and long-term value without ongoing costs, it checks the right boxes. Get an AdGuard VPN 5-year subscription for just $39.97 (MSRP $359.40).
